title: Beehiiv vs MailerLite (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and MailerLite. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
intro: Both Beehiiv and MailerLite offer freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers seeking monetization and growth tools, while MailerLite targets small businesses and freelancers with budget-friendly automation. Choosing between them depends on your primary use case and feature priorities.
choose_a_if: You're building a paid newsletter or media publication and need monetization features
You want access to an ad network to generate revenue from your audience
You prioritize newsletter growth tools and have a larger subscriber base
choose_b_if: You're a small business or freelancer on a tight budget with limited email subscribers
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and e-commerce integrations for marketing campaigns
You want powerful automation and survey tools without high upfront costs

faq.a: Neither is universally better—they serve different needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers seeking monetization and growth, while MailerLite is superior for small businesses needing affordable automation and e-commerce features. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize revenue generation or cost-effective marketing automation.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or MailerLite?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at just $9/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. Additionally, MailerLite's free tier supports 1,000 subscribers while Beehiiv offers 2,500, but MailerLite's paid plans scale more affordably for budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from MailerLite to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support subscriber list imports and exports. However, you may lose some campaign history and advanced segmentation data during migration. It's recommended to plan your transition carefully and test with a small segment first to ensure all data transfers correctly.
